name: Main Home
description: The default landing surface — a vertically scrolling Feed of authored posts, framed by lightweight discovery affordances (channel rail, recruiter callout, keyword-subscription row) above the fold. Optimized for low-friction scanning: density is high, chrome is thin. The only persistent commit is the TabBar's accent 'Create' entry, so no FAB is used on this screen.

top.note: home variant — leading menu (hamburger), wordmark title left-of-center, trailing icon cluster (message, bell, profile).

rail.note: Horizontally scrollable channel + feed-mode rail. 'For You / Recent / Popular' are feed-mode chips inside the rail, not a `tabs/underline` set — the rail is the navigation primitive here.

props.title: We're hiring designers
props.body: Open roles on the Chorus team — read the brief.

promo.note: Recruiter promo callout. Soft surface, not modal.

props.body: Subscribed to #design-system — you'll see new posts here.

keyword.note: Keyword-subscription callout variant: bell leading, X trailing. Sits directly under the promo callout — keep them as two discrete callouts, do not fuse.

items.title: Tokens build is clean
items.body: Shipped the new tokens build today — light/dark parity is finally clean.

items.title: Second pair of eyes
items.body: Looking for a second pair of eyes on the navigation-bar search variant.

body.note: Author header (avatar, channel, time), title, body preview, footer (heart, comment, view counts) per feed/feed spec.

bottom.note: Six-item TabBar. The 'Create' tab uses `appearance: primary` (brand-tinted glyph) and is the canonical commit shortcut — no FAB is added on top.

rules: No FAB on this screen — the TabBar 'Create' tab carries the canonical commit. Adding a `button/fab` would duplicate the affordance.
Feed-mode chips (For You / Recent / Popular) live inside `channel-rail`, not `tabs/underline`. Do not promote to a tabset.
Promo + keyword rows are two discrete callouts, not one fused block.
Do not stack a second NavigationBar inside body — section labels belong inside row chrome.
